steps.title: Combine the coefficients
steps.content: All three terms are like terms because they each contain $x^4$. Add only the coefficients.

steps.title: Match the requested constant
steps.content: $$6x^4+8x^4-3x^4=(6+8-3)x^4$$$$6x^4+8x^4-3x^4=11x^4$$This matches $bx^4$, so $b$ is $11$. The answer is 11.
